hero.title: Anthyphera
hero.subtitle: Find signal. Commit with discipline.
hero.body: Anthyphera is a trading and investment firm focused on complex systems. We isolate the drivers that persist, pressure-test assumptions, and deploy capital where structure is durable.

method.title: A single framework across markets.
method.intro: We simplify, validate, and execute only when the underlying structure is measurable.

steps.title: Distill
steps.body: Reduce noisy systems to the few relationships that actually drive outcomes.

steps.title: Validate
steps.body: Retain only patterns that remain reliable across regimes, regions, and time horizons.

steps.title: Allocate
steps.body: Deploy capital when upside, downside, and invalidation criteria are explicitly defined.

revenue.title: How value is generated
revenue.intro: Execution and capital allocation lead; research compounds edge in both.

pillars.title: Trading
pillars.body: We express views when structure, pricing, and timing align with favorable risk/reward.

pillars.title: Investing
pillars.body: We back long-duration opportunities anchored in hard constraints and durable demand.

pillars.title: Advisory
pillars.body: We partner selectively where our process can materially improve strategic decisions.

domains.title: Where the framework compounds
domains.intro: The context changes by field; the decision process does not.

items.title: Commodities
items.body: Production, logistics, storage, and price formation across physical markets.

items.title: Science
items.body: Causal models, robust measurement, and repeatable empirical results.

items.title: Philosophy
items.body: Clear assumptions, rigorous logic, and durable conceptual frameworks.

items.title: Infrastructure
items.body: Networks and assets shaped by engineering limits and policy design.

items.title: Frontier Fields
items.body: Emerging sectors where uncertainty is high and market structure is still maturing.

nameMeaning.title: Why Anthyphera
nameMeaning.body: Anthyphera references iterative reduction: strip away what is non-essential until the governing proportion is visible. That principle guides how we form conviction, size risk, and compound capital.

principles.title: Standards behind every decision
principles.intro: Our process is accountable to explicit operating rules.

items.title: Evidence-led
items.body: Every material claim must be supported by observable data.

items.title: Regime-robust
items.body: We favor relationships that persist through volatility and structural change.

items.title: Economical
items.body: Additional complexity must improve decisions, not decorate them.

items.title: Pre-defined risk
items.body: Loss conditions are set in advance and enforced in execution.

cta.title: Designed to compound over time
cta.body: Performance funds deeper research. Better research sharpens judgment. The loop strengthens with repetition.
